data.title: Fusion Fuel Highlights Fiscal Year 2025 Results and Business Progress of Majority-Owned Subsidiary Quality Industrial Corp.; Achieves 45.9% Year-Over-Year Revenue Growth to $16.3 Million
data.description: Dublin, April 02, 2026 - Fusion Fuel Green PLC (Nasdaq: HTOO) announced key financial results for fiscal year 2025 of its majority-owned subsidiary, Quality Industrial Corp. (OTCID: QIND). Fusion Fuel is a prominent energy engineering and advisory company. QIND has shown promising business progress, as indicated by its recent financial standings for the fiscal year.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Falls After Trump, Powell Comments; Micron, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla Are Key Losers
data.description: The stock market experienced a mixed finish on Monday as Dow Jones Futures recorded divergent movements following statements from President Trump and Fed Chair Powell. Oil prices saw a significant rise, while Micron faced a notable decline. Nasdaq also reported a drop after the comments made by Trump and Powell. Key market players such as Micron, Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla ended as significant losers in the trading session.

data.title: Plug Power Secures Largest Electrolyzer Projects To-Date
data.description: Shares of Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) are facing a decline in the premarket trading session. The company has secured a major contract to supply a 275 MW GenEco PEM electrolyzer system for Hy2gen Canada's "Courant" project. This deal comes amidst a general market downturn, adding pressure to the stock's performance. Plug Power has clinched a Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) contract for what is considered one of the largest electrolyzer projects to date. The initiative is geared towards aiding the production of low-carbon ammonia, making use of Canada's low-carbon hydroelectric resources. Hy2gen is spearheading the Courant project, set to be one of North America's biggest low-carbon ammonium nitrate facilities, catering to the mining industry in Québec, Central and Eastern Canada, among other regions. Plug Power is contributing advanced engineering and system design services to synergize electrolyzers, streamline plant configuration, and boost overall performance. Its PEM electrolyzer technology is renowned for its high reliability, efficiency, and operational adaptability.

data.title: Entera Bio Announces Pricing of $10.0 Million Direct Investment by BVF Partners with Potential for up to $24.5 Million in Total Proceeds
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 2, 2026, Entera Bio Ltd. (Nasdaq: ENTX), a prominent developer of oral peptides, revealed its participation in a securities purchase agreement for a private placement. The arrangement, led by funds linked to BVF Partners L.P., signifies a significant development for the company.

data.title: USBC finishes sale of old sensor tech unit, exact details undisclosed.
data.description: Last year, the unemployment rate dropped to a record low of 3.5%, the lowest in over 50 years. The economy added a total of 2.1 million jobs, with strong growth in industries such as healthcare, professional and business services, and construction. This marks the longest streak of job growth on record, with the stock market also hitting record highs. However, concerns exist over wage growth not keeping up with inflation, impacting the purchasing power of many workers. Additionally, trade tensions with various countries led to disruptions in certain sectors, affecting job stability in those industries. Despite these challenges, the overall outlook remains positive, reflecting a robust and dynamic economy.

data.title: OTC Markets Group Welcomes Vallant Financial Inc. to OTCQX
data.description: On April 2, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Vallant Financial Inc. (OTCQX: VLNT), the parent company of Vallant Bank, has met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. is known for managing regulated markets where around 12,000 American and international securities are traded. This move allows Vallant Financial Inc. to trade on a prestigious market segment that offers increased visibility and liquidity for investors.

data.title: Namib Minerals Provides Business Update and Reports Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: The Redwing Mine restart program is making significant progress with the expansion of mine production and milling capacity being on schedule. A key milestone has been reached with the successful completion of the dewatering process. Tulani Sikwila has been appointed as the new CEO to lead the company through its growth phase. The leadership team has also been expanded to support the growth strategy effectively. A business update conference call is scheduled to take place on April 2nd at 8.30am to provide further information on the developments.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Powell Says This; Micron Dives, Alternative Asset Plays Get A Lift (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise on the stock market, while several other indexes recorded a decrease. Federal Reserve Chair Powell addressed the potential inflation impacts related to Iran. There was a notable increase in the value of an aluminum stock, but Micron faced a significant decline. The overall stock market activity included positive movements in alternative asset plays. The live coverage did not provide specifics about the exact numbers associated with these changes.

data.title: Jimmy Song, co-founder of ProductionReady, advocates a 'conservative' node client for Bitcoin, to fund development and educate.
data.description: The co-founder of ProductionReady recently launched a non-profit initiative aimed at supporting the open source development of Bitcoin software and education. The initiative seeks to provide financial assistance for the advancement of Bitcoin technology.

data.title: DriveSure Releases 2026 Dealership Service Retention Report
data.description: A recent report by DriveSure for 2026 on Dealership Service Retention has shed light on the factors influencing customer behavior towards dealership service departments. The report is based on a survey involving over 1,200 vehicle owners. It reveals significant insights into why customers are either moving away from or returning to dealership service departments. The study highlights noticeable changes in price sensitivity, communication preferences, and popular services sought after by customers.

data.title: Crescentia Capital's Portfolio Company, Synsus, Acquires Emerald Bioagriculture
data.description: The acquisition by Crescentia Capital has further bolstered Synsus' position as a leader in biostimulant solutions. The announcement was made on April 4, 2026, in Baltimore. Synsus is known for its innovative approach, and this move signifies a significant step towards enhancing their capabilities in this sector. The acquisition is expected to bring substantial benefits in terms of leadership and innovation. This development underscores Synsus' commitment to providing comprehensive biostimulant solutions.

data.title: Christopher J. Dixon and Sam Dixon: Oxford Advisory Group
data.description: Christopher J. Dixon, a prominent financial advisor at Oxford Advisory Group in Jacksonville, Florida, emphasizes tax-efficient retirement and estate planning strategies to educate clients. With a background as a co-founder and Growth and Education Manager, Dixon, a native of Florida, prioritizes helping clients achieve their financial goals through his expertise.

data.title: INSERTING and REPLACING Register for Galaxy Unpacked 2026 for a Chance to Win BTS Concert Tickets
data.description: Toronto - Samsung Electronics is eagerly anticipating Galaxy Unpacked 2026, with Canadians having a compelling reason to engage.

data.title: Deepcoin Partners with Polymarket to Launch "Event Contract"
data.description: In Grand Cayman on April 4, 2026, Deepcoin, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, revealed a key collaboration with Polymarket, the biggest prediction market worldwide, to introduce its groundbreaking "Event Contract" feature. This partnership aims to enhance user experience by providing access to unique and advanced trading options. This announcement marks a significant step forward for Deepcoin as it continues to expand its services globally.

data.title: AI leader Anthropic launches 'AnthroPAC' amidst legal dispute with Trump admin. Employee-funded effort confronts election-year AI review.
data.description: Amidst a legal dispute with the White House and increasing election-year examination of AI technology, the company Anthropic, responsible for developing Claude, has officially established a PAC funded by its employees. This move comes as a proactive measure to navigate the challenging landscape, with important financial contributions being made by the staff to support the company's endeavors amidst the current circumstances.

data.title: MagneFo Launches. Its Purpose? Redefine How Leadership Teams Understand Business Performance
data.description: A new platform called MagneFo has been introduced to assist leadership teams in accessing up-to-date information on sales, spending, ROI, and growth for quicker and well-informed decision-making. Launched on April 4, 2026 in Dover, Delaware, MagneFo aims to provide executives with real-time visibility across vital metrics. This tool is designed to enhance decision-making processes by offering timely insights into key performance indicators. With the launch of MagneFo, leadership teams can now leverage this platform to streamline operations and drive growth effectively.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Leading Stocks Stand Tall As Market Bounces; Look For This Bullish Signal
data.description: Stock futures dropped due to the unexpectedly strong March jobs report, causing concern in the market. Tesla experienced a sharp decline in stock prices on Thursday. The post-Dow Jones futures indicated that leading stocks were still performing well despite the market fluctuations, highlighting a potential bullish signal to watch out for as the market rebounds from the recent dip.

data.title: PureHealth Research Liver Health Supplements Target Fatty Liver for Improved Daily Energy
data.description: A press release from Manassas, Virginia on April 4, 2026, announced the launch of liver health supplements by PureHealth Research. These supplements are designed to assist individuals facing challenges from processed diets and everyday stress. Symptoms addressed include low energy, slow digestion, and overall discomfort. The supplements aim to provide a solution for individuals experiencing these issues, offering relief from backed-up systems.
